description: Composition Green boat neck top made of of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves, button up details at the shoulder and print along the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every woman needs an ethnic top in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this piece we see a traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with jeans and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
